issues.claim: Voice consistent with chapter 7 declarative-revelatory register
issues.objection: 7.25 speaks in chapter 7's declarative-revelatory voice (per thesis): the senior who has taught technique through chapters 2-6 now reveals what they have actually understood. Voice does not slip into productivity-blog cadence; does not slip into mystical cadence. STRETCHED tagging is explicit where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the operational analog. Coheres with the typology-and-veiling sub-register active across 7.13-7.30. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims a metaphysical concealment (yoga-māyā-samāvṛtaḥ). Engineering analog cannot inherit the metaphysical claim; operates at the operational scope of dashboards-as-designed-surfaces. Counter-example: senior gatekeeping is engineering pathology, not yoga-māyā at operational scope.

notes: Voice in 7.25 is the senior-engineer-revealing voice the chapter has earned by this point. PASS.
